prompt: Audit this draft for AI tells.

assertions.name: audit-flags-present
assertions.description: Output references at least 5 distinct AI patterns from the catalogue

assertions.name: each-flag-has-quoted-phrase
assertions.description: Every flagged pattern shows a quoted phrase from the input draft
assertions.check: every flag block contains a substring from the input file

assertions.name: each-flag-has-explanation
assertions.description: Every flagged pattern has a brief 'why' explanation
assertions.check: every flag block contains an explanation paragraph or 'Why' line

assertions.name: ends-with-next-step-question
assertions.description: Output ends with a question offering suggestions / rewrite / done

assertions.name: no-rewritten-draft
assertions.description: Output does not contain a rewritten version of the input draft
assertions.check: no large prose block in output that wasn't in the input

assertions.name: explanations-are-educational
assertions.description: Each pattern's explanation teaches the writer to spot the pattern next time, rather than just naming it
